channel.title: Posts on Shivendra TechSter
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Shivendra TechSter

item.title: How to Reset Logitech Keyboard
item.description: Press these keys individually in the mentioned order do not press them together: esc o (this is alphabet o not zero) esc o esc b After successful reset keyboards which can connect up to three devices should have the LEDs blinking on F1, F2, and F3 keys. There may be few reasons you want to reset your logitech keyboard, something is not working as expected, the keyboard is powering on but not functioning at all or you are reselling your keyboard.

item.title: Create Rest Api With Go Gin GORM and Postgres
item.description: In this post we’ll create an API using Go, Gin and GORM, that will allow us to save and fetch todo items from a Postgres database. Project Setup To start the project setup, create a directory (folder) with the name of your project. Here I’ll create a directory named todo-go-backend. Let’s initialize Go module in our project so that we can install libraries using go mod. Run the following command in the project directory:

item.title: How to create Desktop Entry for an App on Linux
item.description: This post will guide on how to create desktop entry for an app on Linux. We would use MenuLibre to do this. MenuLibre is an advance menu editor for the Free and Open Source desktop and supports Budgie, GNOME, KDE, LXDE, MATE, Pantheon, Unity, and Xfce. Download and extract MenuLibre To download MenuLibre go the the GitHub Repository of MenuLibre and click on the latest release link in the Releases section.

item.title: How to Use wxWidgets with Visual Studio 2022
item.description: This post will guide you on how to build wxWidgets from source and use in your project. First of all go to wxWidgets.com/downloads and then download the Windows ZIP file from the Source code section. Now you can make a folder with the name SDKs (or whatever you prefer) and unzip the downloaded the source code in that folder. If you created the SDKs folder in C drive then right now your path to source code directory would be like this C:\SDKs\wxWidgets-3.
